description:
Open the BFI-25 personality dataset (/home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25.csv) in Jamovi and perform a Confirmatory Factor Analysis (CFA) to test whether the theoretical Big Five factor structure fits the data. The dataset contains 25 personality items (A1-A5, C1-C5, E1-E5, N1-N5, O1-O5) rated on a 1-6 scale. Define five factors with the following item assignments: Agreeableness (A1-A5), Conscientiousness (C1-C5), Extraversion (E1-E5), Neuroticism (N1-N5), and Openness (O1-O5). Save the Jamovi project to /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/BFI25_CFA.omv. Record the model fit measures (CFI, TLI, RMSEA, and SRMR) in /home/ga/Documents/Jamovi/CFA_results.txt using this exact format:

CFI: <value>
TLI: <value>
RMSEA: <value>
SRMR: <value>
